title: Creator Headshot Refresh
prompt: Create a polished creator headshot with soft studio lighting, realistic skin texture, clean neutral background, premium but natural expression
note: Useful for profile images, creator cards, and about-page portraits.

title: Editorial Vertical Portrait
prompt: Editorial portrait in a luxury magazine style, realistic face details, subtle cinematic grading, elegant wardrobe, 3:4 vertical crop
note: Fits creator branding and premium editorial visuals.

title: Consistent Avatar Set
prompt: Generate a consistent avatar series of the same person across three branding moods, preserve identity, hairstyle, and camera distance
note: Useful for series consistency and multi-platform profile sets.

title: White Background Listing Image
prompt: Marketplace-ready product image, white background, centered object, clean contact shadow, no clutter, realistic catalog photography
note: Good for marketplaces and catalog pages.

title: Luxury Product Hero Shot
prompt: Premium beauty product on a warm stone pedestal, soft daylight, realistic reflections, shallow depth of field, high-end commercial photography
note: Designed for hero banners and premium product pages.

title: Lifestyle Product Variation
prompt: Create a product lifestyle scene with a soft premium environment, tasteful props, realistic materials, ad-ready composition, 4:5 crop
note: Useful for ads and social media placements.

title: Golden Hour Terrain Study
prompt: Golden hour terrain study with layered mountain depth, natural haze, cinematic sunlight, realistic atmosphere, clean composition
note: Good for scenic concepts and nature-themed campaign visuals.

title: Floating City Fantasy
prompt: Fantasy city floating above the clouds at sunset, dramatic scale, warm sky palette, magical realism, concept-art polish
note: Useful for fantasy concept art and atmospheric explorations.

title: Surreal Color Experiment
prompt: Surreal artwork with vibrant layered colors, dreamlike composition, art-poster quality, bold visual contrast, premium creative direction
note: Useful for creative posters and visual mood exploration.

title: Background Replacement
prompt: Replace the current background with a clean minimal studio setup, preserve subject shape, keep realistic shadows, improve contrast, polished retouching

title: Reference-Led Fashion Remix
prompt: Use the uploaded reference for lighting and mood, but generate a new fashion portrait with the same atmosphere, realistic skin, premium editorial finish

title: Product Relighting Pass
prompt: Relight this product image with softer directional light, cleaner highlights, stronger form separation, and a more premium commercial look
note: Useful when the base packshot is usable but weakly lit.

title: Square Launch Visual
prompt: Square campaign visual for a new product launch, bold centered subject, clear text-safe areas, premium brand palette, paid-social ready
note: Designed for launch posts and paid social.

title: Vertical Story Ad
prompt: Vertical story ad visual, one hero product, soft luxury gradient background, modern brand styling, clean hierarchy, realistic reflections
note: Fits story placements and short-lived promotion units.

title: Promo Poster with Typographic Space
prompt: Design a premium campaign poster with one central subject, dramatic negative space, elegant text area, modern commercial art direction
note: Works for poster-style ads and homepage sections.

title: Packaging Moodboard
prompt: Premium packaging concept board with one hero box, material swatches, neutral palette, realistic paper texture, editorial layout
note: Good for brand moodboards and concept directions.

title: AI Tool Landing Hero
prompt: Landing page hero concept for an AI image tool, premium interface mockup, warm editorial lighting, clean modern SaaS presentation
note: Fits site hero visuals and product explainers.

title: Prompt Workflow Illustration
prompt: Illustrate a prompt-to-image workflow with input card, output previews, soft UI framing, minimal premium SaaS visual language
